title: Saezuru Tori Wa Habatakanai: The Clouds Gather
original_title: 囀る鳥は羽ばたかない The clouds gather
overview: In the hyper-masculine criminal underworld, a masochistic high-ranking yakuza and his newly-assigned bodyguard become increasingly drawn to each other.
